excluded_categories.reason: No user input handling, authentication, permission, or data persistence details beyond basic account creation; missing information on password complexity and rate limiting.
No roles or permission levels are defined in the requirements.
No UI behavior, messages, loading states, or empty states are specified; clarification questions indicate missing feedback details.
No dependencies are explicitly identified in the requirements.
No network-related requirements or dependencies are mentioned.

scenario_generation_rules: Generate positive test cases for successful account creation with valid email and password meeting all business rules.
Generate negative test cases for invalid inputs such as missing email, missing password, duplicate email, and password length violations.
Generate validation test cases for required fields (email and password) as per VAL001 and VAL002.
Generate boundary test cases for password length: exactly 8 characters, exactly 50 characters, 7 characters, 51 characters.
Generate business rule test cases for email uniqueness (BR001), password min/max length (BR002, BR004), email verification requirement before login (BR003), and verification link expiration (BR005).

Do not generate test cases for password complexity beyond length, email format validation, error messages, success feedback, verification link delivery, expired link behavior, or rate limiting, as these are not specified in the requirements.
